expectations.text: The response contains a line starting with 'VERDICT: PASS' or 'VERDICT: FAIL'
expectations.evidence: Line 21: 'VERDICT: PASS' — verdict line present and correctly formatted

expectations.text: The VERDICT line appears before any folder-tidy or iterative-improvement content
expectations.evidence: No folder-tidy or iterative-improvement content present. VERDICT: PASS is the final line of the response.
